name: Ultimate Creation

abilities.name: Power Bar
abilities.text: This crew's power bar is equal to the number of friendly Pylon markers in play.

abilities.name: 3 Linked Grid
abilities.text: When this model activates, it heals 1.

abilities.name: 4 Linked Grid
abilities.text: When this model gains a Shielded token, draw and then discard a card.

abilities.name: 5 Linked Grid
abilities.text: This model receives a (b) to its attack actions.

actions.name: Create Pylon
actions.effects: Make a Pylon marker within range, not within 6" of this crew's deployment zone or another Pylon marker.

extraction_notes: The Linked Grid Bar shows 5 levels (1-5) which control when cumulative abilities become available to Friendly Augmented models based on the power bar level
Power bar level is determined by number of friendly Pylon markers in play
